nodes.label: Phase 6 signpost (CLAUDE.md) — noise-robust SCFF
nodes.rationale: Phase 6 complete (2026-07-01, P6.0-P6.8): confirms A7 (eval-time noise) is real, OURS-specific and directional; commits NoiseAugContrast (the frozen Phase-5 cell + one iid-noise-augmented InfoNCE view) which substantially hardens the dominant tap channel and passes the continual gate — a Stage-1 extension run before the GD namer.

nodes.label: Phase 6 hand-off: noise-robust SCFF (NoiseAugContrast)
nodes.rationale: Run before the GD namer (LP-FT logic: a frozen head can't manufacture backbone robustness); commits NoiseAugContrast = the frozen Phase-5 cell plus one iid-noise-augmented InfoNCE view at sigma_aug=1.0, which substantially-but-partially hardens the dominant tap channel and passes the continual gate, resolving the deferred A7 train-with-noise test from Phase 4.
